_meta.description: One-off patch: normalise `pricing_logic` on barrier families that were tagged `per_meter` (legacy seed naming) so the Add-to-Cart QuoteBuilderPanel treats them as linear-metre barriers and exposes a total-LM input. These are all traffic barriers sold by the linear metre; the spelling drift between per_meter (older seed rows) and per_length (newer pricelist-loader rows) caused the UI to render a unit-quantity spinner instead of the metres input.
_meta.author: Claude Opus 4.7
